Call Now

Family-owned transmission shop in Orange, California

Transmission trouble? Call the local shop drivers keep recommending by name.

For more than 30 years, Premier Transmissions has helped Orange County drivers with transmission diagnostics, repair guidance, rebuild support, and maintenance questions. Customers consistently describe Frank and the shop as honest, professional, and helpful when it comes to understanding what the vehicle really needs.

Shop Status

Checking hours

Monday through Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.

Why drivers choose Premier

  • Diagnostics-first conversations before repair decisions
  • Helpful guidance for high-mileage and fluid-service questions
  • Clear answers and dependable transmission service

Services

Transmission help for the problems drivers notice first.

If your car is slipping, shifting hard, leaking fluid, showing a warning light, or simply not driving the way it should, Premier Transmissions is here to help you figure out the next step with clear guidance and experienced local service.

Transmission Diagnostics

Help for slipping, delayed engagement, warning lights, leaks, unusual sounds, and shifting problems that need a clear next step.

Repair & Rebuild Guidance

Experienced help when the issue may point to repair work, rebuild discussion, or another mechanical cause.

Maintenance & Fluid Questions

Preventative service, routine maintenance concerns, and the kinds of fluid questions that often come up with aging or high-mileage vehicles.

Easy To Reach

Call the shop, get directions fast, and find the Orange location without guessing where to go.

Reputation

The reputation that keeps bringing local drivers back.

What Customers Value

Helpful advice, fair treatment, and clear explanations.

Drivers want a shop that listens, explains the problem clearly, and helps them make an informed decision. That is the kind of experience Premier Transmissions is known for delivering.

Helpful Advice

High-mileage questions

Drivers with older vehicles want practical guidance, especially when the transmission starts acting differently.

Professional Service

Worth calling first

When you want experienced transmission help, speaking with the shop early can save time and reduce guesswork.

Honest Guidance

Honesty over upselling

Customers want straightforward recommendations, not pressure. Clear answers matter when repairs feel stressful.

Clear Communication

Clear explanations

It helps when a shop explains what is happening, what the next step may be, and what details are worth paying attention to.

FAQ

Short answers for the questions customers ask before they call.

What are common signs that a transmission needs attention?

Slipping gears, delayed shifting, hard shifts, leaking fluid, unusual noises, burning smells, or a transmission warning light are all strong reasons to call.

Do you diagnose the problem before recommending repairs?

Yes. Drivers can call the shop to talk through symptoms and get guidance on the next step, whether that means diagnostics, repair, rebuild discussion, or maintenance support.

Do you help drivers with high-mileage transmission concerns?

Yes. High-mileage drivers can call for practical guidance, especially when they have fluid-service questions or changing shift behavior.

Where is the shop located?

Premier Transmissions is located at 808 W Angus Ave Ste D, Orange, CA 92868.

Contact

Call, get directions, or stop by during weekday hours.

Call during weekday hours, stop by the Orange shop, or use the directions link to find the location quickly. Premier Transmissions serves local drivers who want real answers, straightforward help, and a shop they can feel comfortable trusting.
